case_title: JEREMY FANCHER VS. REN DAVIS PHOENIX

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,140.00 FILED BY FANCHER, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT PHOENIX, REN DAVIS AKA RENA R. DAVIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
